title: ATOMIC: obsolete-test sweep + dead-code prune + binary verification (closes-#24 ship gate)
files_modified_note: ZERO source-file modifications. M5 became a verify-and-tag milestone because all 32 M1-enumerated obsolete tests were already absorbed inline by M3 (28) and M4 (4) — cargo check would have failed without inline deletion since the deleted helpers (extract_propagation, type_coercion_breaks_taint, sanitized_sql, sanitized_command, TaintTracker, is_taint_source, etc.) were referenced directly by those tests. The dispatch-contract's 'cargo check passes' stop-threshold implicitly required inline deletion at M3/M4. M5 atomicity is preserved: the dead-code sweep + binary verification + audit constitute one cohesive 'finalization' deliverable.

loc_delta_components.report_additions: +~250 LOC of JSON evidence (M5-audit.json + M5-binary-verification.json + M5-report.json)

phase_a_audit.purpose: Cross-reference M1 32-test enumeration against current HEAD
phase_a_audit.method: grep -nE 'fn <obsolete_test_name>' on each of 32 enumerated tests at HEAD 1f5e138
phase_a_audit.result: 0 matches — all 32 obsolete tests already absorbed by M3 (28 entries in vuln.rs) + M4 (4 entries in remaining/vuln.rs)
deviations_honored: M4-DEVIATION-01: vuln_type_name retained (used by generate_sarif for SARIF rules.name + shortDescription.text — output-shape preservation mandate)

phase_b_deletions.scope: EMPTY — 0 obsolete tests remaining at HEAD
phase_b_deletions.rationale: All M1-enumerated obsolete tests were inline-deleted at M3/M4 because the deleted helper functions (extract_propagation, sanitized_sql, sanitized_command, TaintTracker, etc.) were referenced directly by those tests; cargo check would have failed otherwise. Validator mandate obsolete_test_count_authoritative_in_m1 still satisfied — M1 enumeration was the authoritative source of truth and all 32 entries are now deleted (28 in M3 + 4 in M4).

phase_c_dead_code_sweep.result: PASS — Finished `dev` profile [unoptimized + debuginfo] target(s) in 22.27s with zero warnings, zero dead_code, zero unused-imports
phase_c_dead_code_sweep.verdict: PASS — workspace clean post M3+M4. No surgical pruning required.
